cards.label: Idea Inbox
cards.detail: Original wording is preserved and classified before any export.

cards.label: Deep Research Export
cards.summary: Packets can be prepared, not submitted.
cards.detail: External submission remains a Tim/HQ gate.

cards.label: Report Import
cards.summary: The local script hashes, preserves, and maps report files.
cards.detail: The UI does not run it. Script screening is BASIC_CONTENT_SCREENING with BASIC_CITATION_PRESENCE only.

cards.label: Synthesis
cards.summary: The local script derives advisory recommendations from complete imported fixture reports.
cards.detail: The UI does not run it. Results are ADVISORY_ONLY and cannot approve push, merge, API, background, or source-truth changes.
